title: Aptitude: Trains, Boats, and Streams - Q4

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A boat covers 24 km downstream in 3 hours and the same distance upstream in 4 hours.
 Find: Speed of the boat in still water  Speed of the stream

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Downstream speed = 24 ÷ 3 = 8 km/hr
 Upstream speed = 24 ÷ 4 = 6 km/hr

Boat speed = ½ (8 + 6) = 7 km/hr
 Stream speed = ½ (8 − 6) = 1 km/hr
